news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋去中心化交易所交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana ecosystem's total value locked (TVL) rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade promises stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Chains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding cross-chain interoperability across five major blockchain networks.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟推ZK-Rollup Layer2扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，提议采用ZK-Rollup Layer2技术降低小额转账手续费，目前处于研究阶段。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation's research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 solution to reduce small transaction fees. The proposal is currently under study.
